description: Almost all of the reviews here are paid if you notice the pattern you will see it , beware! Quickads V2 was promoted with a 30‑day trial, just like every other platform out there. But here’s the catch: they charged me the full month in the third week of the trial. When I questioned this, their support rep (Sally) and even their CEO tried to claim the trial ended on December 30th — while both the invoice and the dashboard clearly show January 9th as the end date. After days of back‑and‑forth, they finally admitted the trial runs until January, but still refused to issue a refund. I never used the service at all — I had actually forgotten about it. Yet for 10 days straight I kept getting the same canned responses, no resolution, no accountability. Their CEO on LinkedIn speaks highly of the platform (https://www.linkedin.com/in/nitinmahajan2/), but the reality is very different. This feels like a deliberate scam: charging before the trial ends, ignoring customer complaints, and dragging things out until people give up. I’ve already started reporting this to Google, LinkedIn, and Singapore authorities, and I’ll continue leaving reviews so others don’t fall for the same trap. Lesson learned: be very careful before trusting this company with your card details.
